{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032011542632B4DBC202A74EDAD393"}"},"total":256},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7229036714353607479","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先五星好评啊 ，超级好看，跟之前看过的一千多本小说都不一样的感觉。之前都是现代美女穿越到古代跟王爷在一起要求双洁一生一世一双人。而这位特种兵帅哥穿越到古代当了太子，那真是如鱼得水，会撩很多美女，都不觉得他花心违和，征服世界要先征服女人。这太子没有高端的空间系统，一切靠自己在古代宫廷打拼，火炮狙击枪兵法算术等都靠他的记忆写出来画出来。","text_exts":[{"e":70,"s":67,"text":"特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739788664EDAD393%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227229036714353607479%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227213028331631938615%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683142028,"group_id":"7213028331631938615","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"悠然其乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzA1lmD/OXpNt43FDREwyAQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/991119425eab434184ea845cb6d9ff73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534555&x-signature=L6SUhEbnJWVPW%2BvDIeYcqjSZkW8%3D","user_id":"910042956829323","user_name":"慕容菲芸ff"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910042956829323","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1727663813,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7213028331631938615","book_info":{"abstract":"身为佣兵之王的苏寒，意外穿越大周，成了个冒名顶替的傀儡假太子，刚睁开眼，便看到衣衫不整的绝美古装丽人在诱惑自己……
